# Slabjacking Insurance — slabjackinginsurance.com

> Specialized insurance for slabjacking, mudjacking, polyjacking, and concrete leveling contractors. Powered by Contractors Choice Agency.

## What We Do
We provide specialized commercial insurance coverage tailored to the unique risks of slabjacking, mudjacking, and concrete leveling contractors — including property damage liability during mud injection, equipment coverage, and workers comp for ground crews.

## Coverage Types
- General Liability Insurance for Slabjacking Contractors
- Workers Compensation
- Commercial Auto (pump trucks and rigs)
- Tools & Equipment Coverage (injection pumps, mixers)
- Contractor Bond
- Pollution/Environmental Liability (grout/chemical spills)

## Who We Serve
- Slabjacking contractors
- Mudjacking companies
- Polyjacking / polyurethane foam lifting contractors
- Concrete leveling and lifting specialists
- Foundation repair companies using injection methods

## About
Contractors Choice Agency — 20+ years specializing in contractor insurance. Former contractor background gives us real insight into the risks your crews face daily. Licensed in all 50 states. 15-minute quote turnaround, 2-hour claims response.
